name: BANT
description: 4-factor deal qualification framework. Best for high-velocity sales or early-stage qualification before applying a deeper methodology.

factors.name: Budget
factors.description: Is there allocated budget for this purchase?

levels.green: Budget confirmed and allocated for this fiscal period
levels.yellow: Budget exists in principle but not formally allocated or amount unclear
levels.red: No budget identified or prospect has not discussed budget

factors.name: Authority
factors.description: Are we talking to the decision maker?

levels.green: Primary contact is the decision maker or we have direct access to them
levels.yellow: Decision maker identified but we are working through an intermediary

factors.name: Need
factors.description: Is there a confirmed business need?

levels.green: Prospect has articulated specific pain points and desired outcomes
levels.yellow: General interest expressed but specific needs not fully defined
levels.red: No confirmed need -- exploring or was inbound with unclear intent

factors.name: Timeline
factors.description: Is there a defined timeline for the decision?

levels.green: Specific decision date or go-live date confirmed by the prospect
levels.yellow: General timeframe mentioned but no firm date
levels.red: No timeline discussed or 'no rush' indicated
